## Editing.serializeCollection() function

Serialize a collection to string based on format.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function serializeCollection<T>(collection: ICollectionSourceFile<T>, format: 'yaml' | 'json', options?: IExportOptions): Result<string>;
```
